mnemonics: BAP: Buhler's Axioms are Practical. Remember the three-part framework (Batch, Interactive, Graph) as B-I-G, which spells BIG, for BIG DATA.
keyPoints: Paul Burkhardt Buhler is a researcher known for his work on scalable data analytics.
He co-authored a paper proposing a three-layer architecture for big data analytics systems: Batch Layer, Interactive Layer, and Graph Layer.
This architecture is designed to handle different types of data processing workloads efficiently and scalably.
commonMistakes: Confusing Paul Buhler with other figures in data science, like Doug Cutting or Jeff Dean.
Mistaking the three layers (Batch, Interactive, Graph) for the more common Lambda Architecture layers (Batch, Speed, Serving).
